expectations.text: Model has a focusedPane field (or equivalent) to track which pane is active
expectations.evidence: focus focusedPane field on model struct

expectations.text: Defines two distinct border styles — one for focused (colored) and one for blurred (dim/gray)
expectations.evidence: focusedPaneStyle BorderForeground color 135 (purple) vs blurredPaneStyle color 240 (gray)

expectations.text: Tab key toggles the active pane
expectations.evidence: case "tab": toggles focus between leftPane and rightPane

expectations.text: Key events are only forwarded to the currently focused component
expectations.evidence: if m.focus == leftPane { m.list, cmd = m.list.Update(msg) } — right pane not interactive

expectations.text: Uses lipgloss.JoinHorizontal to place the two panes side by side
Handles tea.WindowSizeMsg and calls list.SetSize (or equivalent) to resize components
Left panel has a fixed or constrained width around 25 characters
